review_outcome: Risk classification confirmed as high-risk (Annex III, Nr. 5c)
rationale: Healthcare AI system processes sensitive patient data during medical consultations. System classifies as high-risk under EU AI Act Annex III Nr. 5c (AI systems intended for use in healthcare). Risk mitigation measures documented in risk_classification_report_v1.pdf. Manual review confirms automated risk classification is correct.
comment: Automated Conftest check verified documentation completeness. This manual review confirms the substantive correctness of the risk classification and the adequacy of mitigation measures.
